title: Building Phase Body Blueprint — first intentional bulk
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's first intentional bulking phase, planned Dec 2024: 10-week clean bulk (75 days) → 4-5 week shedding phase (31 days). Pairs to 2024 02 07 Successful Cut as the bulk-arm of the cycle.
  • Macros target: 200g protein (800 cal) + 350g carbs (1400 cal) + 80g fat (720 cal) = ~2,900-3,000 cal/day.
  • 6-day rotating split: push/sidedelt/abs → pull/reardelt/tris → legs/biceps → rest/cardio → push/shoulders/abs → pull/reardelt/tris → legs/calves/biceps → rest/cardio.
  • Sleep promoted to "third equal pillar alongside training + diet" — named the fabian strat: casein protein before bed, magnesium + ashwagandha + 2nd dose of turkesterone, pre-planned next-day TODOs to protect sleep rhythm.
  • Closes with the line: "Don't become a machine, there will be machines that will be better machines" — a small anti-optimization aphorism worth preserving.

The cycle

Yahir frames this as a paired protocol with the cut: bulk hard for 75 days, shed clean for 31. "I need to push my body, mind, and discipline." The bulk is explicitly first-time-intentional — a signal that prior bulks were either accidental or undisciplined.

The split alternates muscle-group emphasis each rotation, with rest/cardio breaking the 7-day pattern into a true 6-on-1-off cycle (different from earlier 2022 12 22 Workout 6x regiment which was a fixed Mon-Sat).

The macros + timing

  • Protein: 200g/day = 800 cal — target for synthesis
  • Carbs: 350g/day = 1,400 cal — fueling the building
  • Fat: 80g/day = 720 cal — minimum required for hormone synthesis
  • Total: ~2,900-3,000 cal/day

Meal spacing: wake-up meal → small pre-lift → post-lift → evening → optional night meal if within budget. "This sounds the most reasonable right now for my digestion." — Yahir notes this is empirical, not dogmatic.

The sleep pillar (and the Fabian strat)

The most distinctive move in this doc: promoting sleep to a third equal pillar alongside training and diet. "This in itself should be thought of as equal to Training and Diet."

Pre-bed protocol Yahir named the Fabian strat (entity-source: fabian friend, "change is the only constant" elbow tattoo, mentioned in 2026 01 29 letter to emily):

  1. Casein protein before bed (slow-release nighttime protein synthesis)
  2. Magnesium + ashwagandha + 2nd-dose turkesterone
  3. Pre-planned next-day TODOs to protect sleep rhythm

This is consistent with the supplement stack concept already in the vault — "8-9 natural supplements that all serve a purpose." Each member of the stack is purpose-justified, not stacked-vibes.

The anti-optimization clincher

The doc's last line: "Trigger/catalyst will be training and food input/recovery will be the building result. I'm excited, this has clicked and look forward to putting it into practice. Remember don't become a machine, there will be machines that will be better machines."

The "don't become a machine" is a small but rare anti-optimization aphorism inside an otherwise highly-optimized doc — Yahir flagging that the goal is the human flourishing, not the spreadsheet perfection.

Why it matters in the graph

This pairs directly to:

  • 2024 02 07 Successful Cut — the cut arm of the same cycle, also Kyle-paired at that time
  • 2022 12 22 Workout 6x regiment — the earlier 6-day split that this doc evolves
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — the synthesis page for the fitness-to-Brotein lineage; this doc is concrete evidence of why Yahir thought a fitness-tracking app would feel native to him as a builder
  • brotein — the productization of this lifting/macro discipline
  • supplement stack — the formalized stack concept Yahir has developed across multiple notes

Privacy

No credentials. Two screenshots of macro/supplement breakdowns referenced, image data only.
